# `aube access grant`

- **Usage**: `aube access grant <ARGS>…`

Grant a team read-only or read-write access to a package

## Arguments

### `<PERMISSIONS>`

`read-only` or `read-write`

### `<TEAM>`

Team in `@scope:team` form

### `<PACKAGE>`

Package name
